calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Preliminary Distribution To Beneficiary Calvin Johnson
Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order

For Order For Withdrawal Of Attorney For Admin. Wwa
Off Calendar Jan-08-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Debra Dolch. Paul Mori for Katherine Johnson Clemmons (Administrator). Peter Schwarz for Calvin Johnson.

Mr. Schwarz reported that he was not able to serve Ms. Clemmons and that he could not locate her. The Court granted the petition for withdrawal of attorney, (signing the order for the same in open court). The Court removed Katherine Johnson Clemmons and suspended her powers. Mr. Schwarz will prepare the order. The Court granted the petition appointing Ms Dolch as the Administrator, (signing the order for the same in open court). Bond in the amount of $10,000.00 is required.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-08-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Suspension Of Powers, Removal Of Representative And Appointment Of Successor Administrator.
Off Calendar Jan-08-2008 Text Ruling

For Issuance Of Citation To Compel Account
Off Calendar Jan-08-2008 Text Ruling

For Issuance Of Citation To Compel Account
Off Calendar Oct-22-2007 Advanced From Dec-04-07 To Oct-31-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Letters Of Special Administration
Off Calendar Nov-30-2007 Granted Per Written Order

For Order For Withdrawal Of Attorney For Admin. Wwa
Off Calendar Nov-20-2007 Continued To Jan-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Mori for Katherine Johnson Clemons (Administrator). Peter Schwarz for and with Calvin Johnson.

The Court stated that Mr. Mori's petition to withdraw as counsel needed to be done on the mandatory judicial counsel form and noticed as a motion, which was acknowledged by Counsel. Mr. Schwarz reported that they were unable to serve the citation on Ms. Clemons and that they had not received the records from Wells Fargo Bank. In addition, he requested that the powers of Ms. Clemons as administrator be held. The Court informed Mr. Schwarz that a Petition for Appointment of Successor Adminsitrator, and for Removal/Suspension needed to be filed. Mr. Schwarz stated that Debra Dolch had agreed to act as Administrator. Mr. Mori reported that he had been unable to contact Ms. Clemons. Both matters were continued to January 08, 2008.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiffs: R. Guitron and R. Leong.

For Issuance Of Citation To Compel Account
Off Calendar Nov-20-2007 Continued To Jan-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

For Issuance Of Citation To Compel Account

For Issuance Of Citation To Compel Account
Off Calendar Oct-31-2007 Continued To Nov-07-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Schwarz for Calvin Johnson. Paul Mori for Katherine Clemons (Administrator).

Mr. Schwarz presented a Proof of Service and Order for issuance of the Citation. He expressed concern about no bond on the estate and reported that he had not received the subpeonaed records. The Court pointed out that the Proof of Service was not in proper form and directed Mr. Schwarz to correct and file the Proof of Service. Mr. Mori stated that he filed a petition to withdraw due to breakdown in communication with his client. The matter was continued to November 11, 2007.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Doug Handa.
